%% Procedure to obtain "Fine Tea, Full Moon" in Genshin Impact
flowchart TD
    A["Check Event Availability (event active?)"] --> B["Participate in Event Quests (-> Fine Tea, Full Moon)"]
    B --> C["Unlock the Recipe (quest reward or event shop) (-> Fine Tea, Full Moon)"]
    C -->|recipe| D["Learn the Recipe (Inventory → Precious Items) (-> Fine Tea, Full Moon)"]
    D --> E["Gather Ingredients (Tea Leaves, Sugar, Lotus Head, Milk) (-> Fine Tea, Full Moon)"]
    E -->|ingredients| F["Cook the Dish (-> Fine Tea, Full Moon)"]

%% Procedure to reach the Nether in Minecraft
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Wood (punch trees) → Craft Crafting Table & Wooden Pickaxe"] 
    B["Mine Stone (Cobblestone) & Iron Ore"]
    C["Craft Furnace & Smelt Iron → Iron Ingots"]
    D["Craft Bucket (using Iron Ingots)"]
    E["Collect Water and Lava (using Bucket)"]
    F["Create Obsidian (water over lava)"]
    G["Build Nether Portal Frame (10 Obsidian)"]
    H["Gather Flint (from Gravel)"]
    I["Craft Flint and Steel (Flint + Iron Ingot)"]
    J["Activate Nether Portal (Flint & Steel)"]
    K["Enter the Nether"]

    A -->|Wood (fuel)| C
    B -->|Iron Ore| C
    B -->|Cobblestone (8) for Furnace| C
    C -->|Iron Ingots (3) for Bucket| D
    C -->|Iron Ingot (1) for Flint & Steel| I
    D -->|Bucket| E
    E -->|Water & Lava| F
    F -->|Obsidian (10)| G
    H -->|Flint| I
    I -->|Flint and Steel| J
    G -->|Portal Frame| J
    J -->|Activated Portal| K

%% Procedure to achieve Sharpness +1 in Monster Hunter Generations
flowchart TD
    A["Identify Armor Sets (Nargacuga, Seregios, Silver Sol)"] -->|Handicraft points from armor| B["Mix and Match Armor Pieces (reach ≥ +10 Handicraft)"]
    B -->|additional Handicraft| C["Add Decorations (Gems) – crafted at Smithy using monster materials"]
    C -->|additional Handicraft| D["Add Charms (talismans) with Handicraft"]
    D -->|total Handicraft| E["Check Handicraft Points (status screen)"]
    E -->|Handicraft +10| F["Achieve Sharpness +1 Skill"]
    B -->|need more materials| G["Advanced Tips (hunt higher‑rank monsters for armor & decoration materials)"]
    C --> G
    D --> G

%% Procedure to create Lingering Potions of Harming II in Minecraft
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Materials: Blaze Powder, Water Bottles, Nether Wart, Fermented Spider Eye, Glowstone Dust, Gunpowder, Dragon's Breath, Brewing Stand"] -->|"Blaze Powder, Water Bottles, Nether Wart"| B["Brew Awkward Potions"]
    B -->|"Fermented Spider Eye"| C["Brew Potion of Harming I"]
    C -->|"Glowstone Dust"| D["Upgrade to Harming II"]
    D -->|"Gunpowder"| E["Make Splash Potion of Harming II"]
    E -->|"Dragon's Breath"| F["Make Lingering Potion of Harming II"]

%% Procedure to get the Titanium Sword in Terraria
flowchart TD
    A["Defeat the Wall of Flesh (activate Hardmode)"] -->|Hardmode, Pwnhammer (dropped by Wall of Flesh)| B["Break Demon/Crimson Altars (use Pwnhammer)"]
    B -->|Titanium Ore (from 3+ altars)| C["Mine Titanium Ore (requires Mythril/Orichalcum Pickaxe)"]
    C -->|Titanium Ore| D["Smelt Titanium Bars (using Adamantite/Titanium Forge)"]
    D -->|Titanium Bars (35)| E["Craft the Titanium Sword (at Mythril/Orichalcum Anvil)"]
    E -->|Titanium Sword| F["Obtain Titanium Sword"]

%% Procedure to center text across cells in Microsoft Excel without merging
flowchart TD
    A["Open Excel Worksheet"] -->|Excel worksheet| B["Select Cells (e.g., A1 and B1)"]
    B -->|selected cells| C["Open Format Cells Dialog"]
    C -->|Format Cells dialog| D["Navigate to Alignment Tab"]
    D -->|Alignment tab| E["Select 'Center Across Selection'"]
    E -->|Center Across Selection option| F["Apply Changes (click OK)"]
    F -->|applied changes| G["Verify Result"]

%% Procedure to become a model in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Start With Right Attributes (Look >90%, Health)"] -->|maintain high Looks| B["Graduate High School (age 18+)"]
    B -->|age 18+| C["Start as Foot Model (apply via Jobs → Special Careers → Actor/Modeling)"]
    C --> D["Maintain & Increase Fame (social media, shoots, runway)"]
    D --> E["Move Into Regular Modeling (Catalog/Runway Model)"]
    E --> F["Get Agent for Elite Gigs (hire via Fame menu)"]
    F -->|agent offers auditions| G["Attend Auditions (say Yes)"]
    G --> H["Keep Career Stable (work yearly, boost Looks)"]
    H --> I["Max Out Fame (books, talk shows, sponsorships)"]
    I --> J["Retire Gracefully (pivot or save money)"]
    A -->|high Looks needed| G

%% Procedure to enable Secure Boot in BIOS/UEFI to fix Valorant Vanguard errors
flowchart TD
    A["Fix Valorant Vanguard errors: Enable Secure Boot"] --> B["Restart PC and enter BIOS/UEFI"]
    B -->|Enter BIOS/UEFI| C["Locate Secure Boot settings"]
    C -->|Secure Boot settings| D["Ensure UEFI mode is enabled"]
    D -->|UEFI mode| E{"Switching from Legacy to UEFI?"}
    E -- Yes -->|Legacy → UEFI| F["Convert drive from MBR to GPT"]
    E -- No --> G["Proceed"]
    F --> G
    G -->|UEFI mode confirmed| H{"Secure Boot grayed out?"}
    H -- Yes -->|Grayed out| I["Set OS Type to Windows UEFI Mode"]
    H -- No --> J["Enable Secure Boot (Standard mode)"]
    I --> J
    J -->|Secure Boot enabled| K["Save and exit (F10)"]
    K -->|Saved changes| L["Verify Secure Boot is on (msinfo32)"]
    L -->|Check Secure Boot State| M["Secure Boot State: On"]

%% Optimal boss order in Hollow Knight
flowchart TD
    A["False Knight (Forgotten Crossroads) – Nail + base health, maybe 1 Mask Shard"] --> B["Gruz Mother (Forgotten Crossroads) – Same gear"]
    B --> C["Vengefly King (Greenpath) – Basic nail, 4‑5 masks"]
    C -->|Masks (4‑5)| D["Hornet (Protector) (Greenpath) – Mothwing Cloak (dash), 4‑5 masks"]
    D -->|Dash (Mothwing Cloak)| E["Massive Moss Charger (Greenpath side) – Dash"]
    D -->|Dash (Mothwing Cloak)| F["Mantis Lords (Fungal Wastes) – Dash, 6+ masks"]

%% Procedure to show/record Nintendo Switch gameplay on a PC
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Equipment: Nintendo Switch (-> Nintendo Switch), Switch dock, HDMI cable, AC adapter, USB capture card, USB cable, PC (-> your PC)"] --> B["Set Up Switch Dock"]
    B -->|HDMI cable| C["Connect to Capture Card"]
    C -->|USB cable| D["Connect Capture Card to PC"]
    D -->|capture card (-> USB capture card) recognized as video device| E["Install Software"]
    E -->|select capture card as video source| F["Start Playing"]

%% Procedure to escape through the main door in Granny on Extreme difficulty
flowchart TD
    A["Understand the Layout"] --> B["Gather Tools and Items: Padlock Key, Master Key, Hammer, Pliers, Wrench, Wire Cutters, Wooden Stake, Cogwheels (Red & Blue)"]
    B -->| "Wire Cutters" | C["Disable Security: door alarm & electrical lock"]
    B -->| "Hammer, Pliers" | D["Remove Barricades: wooden planks & basement wires"]
    B -->| "Padlock Key" | E["Unlock Padlock at Main Door"]
    B -->| "Master Key" | F["Unlock Main Door"]
    C --> D
    D --> E
    E --> F
    F --> G["Distract Granny (stealth & noises)"]
    G --> H["Avoid Traps: bear traps & creaking floors"]
    H --> I["Final Steps: Exit through the Main Door"]

%% Procedure to use a Gamertag Generator
flowchart TD
    A["Choose a Gamertag Generator Tool"] --> B["Select Your Preferences"]
    B --> C["Enter Your Information"]
    C --> D["Generate Suggestions"]
    D -->|generated gamertags| E["Review and Pick a Favorite"]
    E -->|chosen gamertag| F["Check Availability"]
    F -->|available gamertag| G["Save or Copy Your Gamertag"]
    F -->|unavailable, tweak| E
    E -->|chosen gamertag| G

%% Procedure to disable Quick Chat in Among Us
flowchart TD
    A["Open Among Us (-> Among Us)"] -->|game loaded| B["Go to Main Menu"]
    B -->|settings button| C["Open Settings"]
    C -->|select Data Tab| D["Select Data Tab"]
    D -->|Chat Type option| E["Find Chat Type Option"]
    E -->|Chat Type| F["Change Chat Type to Free or Quick Chat"]
    F -->|Free or Quick Chat| G["Confirm Age Setting (-> account age ≥13)"]
    G -->|settings changed| H["Save and Exit"]

%% Procedure to play 2‑Player Split‑Screen Mode in Fortnite
flowchart TD
    A["Prepare Setup (Platform: PlayStation / Xbox, Display: 1 TV‑monitor, Controllers: 2)"] -->|Platform, Display, Controllers| B["Start Fortnite"]
    B -->|Fortnite launched| C["Sign In Player 1 (Epic Games account) → Lobby"]
    D["Connect Player 2’s Controller (second controller, different Epic/guest account)"] -->|Controller + Account| E["Join Player 1’s Lobby (Press X on PlayStation / A on Xbox) → Two characters in lobby"]
    C -->|Player 1’s Lobby| E
    E --> F["Select Game Mode (Duos / Squads – Battle Royale)"]
    F -->|Duos / Squads| G["Start Match (Player 1 Ready Up) → Split‑screen (horizontal)"]
    G -->|Split‑screen session| H["Play Together (shared session, separate progress/inventory)"]

%% Procedure to defeat Sans on the Genocide route in Undertale
flowchart TD
    A["Save right before the fight (-> Sans fight)"]
    B["Stock up on healing items (-> Butterscotch Pie, Snowman Piece, Tough Glove)"]
    C["Equip gear that gives maximum attack (-> high ATK)"]
    D["Set mental state: memorization, micro‑dodging, patience"]
    E["Phase 1: Opening / Early attacks"]
    F["Phase 2: Middle escalation"]
    G["Final sequence / “Last attack”"]
    H["General tips & tricks"]
    I["After defeating Sans (-> post‑fight ending)"]
    J["Summary of essentials"]

    A -->|start| E
    B -->|use healing items (-> Butterscotch Pie) | E
    B -->|use healing items (-> Snowman Piece / Tough Glove) | F
    B -->|use healing items (-> remaining heals) | G
    C --> E
    D --> E
    E --> F
    F --> G
    G --> I
    H --> E
    H --> F
    H --> G
    J --> I

%% Procedure to become President in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Start with a Suitable Character (-> United States, high Smarts, high Looks)"] -->|"high Smarts, high Looks"| B["Focus on Education (-> high grades, popularity, leadership)"]
    B -->|"maintain high grades"| C["University Education (-> Political Science or related major)"]
    C -->|"credentials, high grades"| D["Build a Strong Resume (-> graduate degree, Lawyer, Business Executive)"]
    D -->|"health & reputation"| E["Maintain Good Health and Reputation (-> gym, meditate, doctor, avoid illegal activities)"]
    D -->|"funds for campaign"| F["Enter Politics (-> local position, campaign money)"]
    E -->|"good health supports campaign"| F
    F -->|"local office experience, approval"| G["Climb the Political Ladder (-> higher offices, approval ratings)"]
    G -->|"experience, funds, reputation"| H["Run for President (-> high approval, strong backing)"]
    H -->|"manage presidency, avoid scandals"| I["Manage Your Presidency (-> keep approval, avoid impeachment)"]
    I -->|"if failed, rebuild reputation & wealth"| J["Repeat if Necessary (-> reputation, wealth)"]
    J --> A

%% Procedure to make money quickly in Stardew Valley
flowchart TD
    A["Spring Year 1: Focus on Crops\n- Parsnips, Potatoes (-> Pierre’s General Store)\n- Strawberries (-> Egg Festival)"] --> B["Fishing\n- Learn mini‑game, catch high‑value fish (Catfish, Eels)\n- Invest in Fiberglass Rod"]
    B --> C["Foraging\n- Gather Wild Horseradish, Daffodils, Leeks, Dandelions\n- Use Scythe for Mixed Seeds"]
    C --> D["Mining\n- Mine Copper, Iron ores\n- Get good Pickaxe"]
    D --> E["Animal Products\n- Build Coop, Barn\n- Chickens (Eggs), Cows (Milk)"]
    E --> F["Summer Year 1: Blueberries"]
    F --> G["Fall Year 1: Cranberries"]
    G --> H["Artisan Goods\n- Produce Mayonnaise, Cheese, Jelly, Wine\n- Use Kegs, Preserves Jars"]
    H --> I["Winter: Preparation and Foraging\n- Upgrade tools, clear land\n- Fishing & Mining"]
    I --> J["Upgrades & Infrastructure\n- Upgrade house, build Sheds, add Kegs, Preserves Jars"]
    J --> K["Quests & Special Events\n- Complete Bulletin Board quests, festivals"]

    E -- "Eggs, Milk (-> Animal Products)" --> H
    F -- "Blueberries (-> Summer Blueberries)" --> H
    G -- "Cranberries (-> Fall Cranberries)" --> H
    H -- "Kegs, Preserves Jars (-> Artisan Goods)" --> J

%% Procedure to install or repair BattlEye manually
flowchart TD
    A["Ensure Game Compatibility (verify the game uses BattlEye)"] -->|"Game uses BattlEye" B["Locate the BattlEye Folder (game install directory)"]
    B -->|"BattlEye folder path" C["Find the BattlEye Installer (Install_BattlEye.bat/.exe)"]
    C -->|"Installer file" D["Run the BattlEye Installer"]
    D --> E["Follow On‑Screen Instructions"]
    E --> F["Verify the Installation (start the game)"]
    F -->|if update needed| G["Update BattlEye (if necessary)"]
    F -->|if issues| H["Troubleshoot Installation Issues (admin rights, antivirus exceptions)"]
    H --> I["Contact Support (if needed)"]

%% Procedure to become an actor in BitLife without using God Mode
flowchart TD
    A["Start with a High Looks Stat (>80%)"] -->|high Looks| B["Focus on Your Appearance (gym, surgery, salon)"]
    B -->|maintained Looks| G["Maintain Your Looks and Health"]
    C["Participate in Activities (join Drama Club)"] -->|Drama Club experience| E["Apply for a Voiceover Actor Job"]
    D["Graduate High School (obtain High School Diploma)"] -->|high school diploma| E
    E -->|Voiceover Actor job| F["Work Hard and Get Promoted (Actor → Lead Actor → Star)"]
    F -->|promotion to Lead Actor/Star| H["Strive for Lead Roles and Fame"]
    G -->|maintained Looks & Health| H
    A -->|high Looks| C
    A -->|high Looks| D

%% Procedure to connect Wii to Smart TV
flowchart TD
    start["Choose Connection Method"]

    %% AV (Composite) method
    A1["Identify AV Cable (-> Wii composite AV cable)"]
    B1["Locate AV Inputs on TV"]
    C1["Connect Cables (AV)"]
    D1["Select AV Input"]
    E1["Power On Wii"]
    start -->|AV (Composite)| A1
    A1 --> B1
    B1 -->|AV Cable (-> Wii composite AV cable)| C1
    C1 --> D1
    D1 --> E1

    %% Component Cable method
    A2["Obtain Component Cable (-> Wii Component Cable)"]
    B2["Locate Component Inputs on TV"]
    C2["Connect Cables (Component)"]
    D2["Select Component Input"]
    E2["Power On Wii"]
    start -->|Component Cable| A2
    A2 --> B2
    B2 -->|Component Cable (-> Wii Component Cable)| C2
    C2 --> D2
    D2 --> E2

    %% HDMI method
    A3["Purchase HDMI Adapter (-> Wii to HDMI Adapter)"]
    B3["Connect Adapter to Wii"]
    C3["Connect HDMI Cable"]
    D3["Select HDMI Input"]
    E3["Power On Wii"]
    start -->|HDMI (Adapter)| A3
    A3 -->|Wii to HDMI Adapter| B3
    B3 -->|HDMI Cable| C3
    C3 --> D3
    D3 --> E3

    %% SCART method
    A4["Get SCART Adapter (-> Wii SCART Adapter)"]
    B4["Plug AV Cables into Adapter"]
    C4["Connect Adapter to TV (SCART)"]
    D4["Select SCART Input"]
    E4["Power On Wii"]
    start -->|SCART| A4
    A4 -->|Wii SCART Adapter| B4
    B4 -->|AV Cables (-> Wii composite AV cable)| C4
    C4 --> D4
    D4 --> E4

    %% S-Video method
    A5["Acquire S-Video Cable (-> Wii S-Video Cable)"]
    B5["Locate S-Video and Audio Inputs"]
    C5["Connect Cables (S-Video)"]
    D5["Select S-Video Input"]
    E5["Power On Wii"]
    start -->|S-Video| A5
    A5 -->|Wii S-Video Cable| B5
    B5 -->|S-Video Cable| C5
    C5 --> D5
    D5 --> E5

%% Procedure to play the Sara Sarita sleepover game
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Materials: two coins (same denomination)"] -->| "two coins" | D["Hold the Coins (each player holds one coin)"]
    B["Choose a Partner (friend)"] -->| "partner" | C["Sit Opposite Each Other"]
    C --> D
    D -->| "coins" | F["Toss the Coins (simultaneous)"]
    E["Ask for Permission: “Sara Sarita, may we join your game?” (-> Sara Sarita)"] -->| "your game (-> Sara Sarita)" | F
    F --> G["Interpret the Results"]
    G -->| "Yes" | H["Proceed with Questions (ask, toss after each)"]
    G -->| "No / Maybe" | X["No further action"]
    H --> I["Conclude the Game: ask “Sara Sarita, may we leave your game?” and toss"]
    I -->| "Yes (to leave)" | J["Ending the Game: exit"]
    I -->| "No / Maybe (continue asking)" | I
    %% Entity references for later steps
    E -->| "Sara Sarita" | I

%% Procedure to create a powerful deck in Clash Royale
flowchart TD
    A["Understand Card Types"] -->|Card Types| B["Choose Win Condition"]
    B -->|Win Condition (-> Hog Rider, Royal Giant, Balloon, etc.)| C["Add Support and Defensive Cards"]
    C -->|Support & Defensive Cards| D["Include Spells"]
    D -->|Spells (-> Fireball, Zap, etc.)| E["Balance Elixir Cost"]
    E -->|Balanced Elixir (3.0‑4.0)| F["Test and Adjust"]
    F -->|Test Results| G["Adapt to the Meta"]
    G -->|Meta Adjustments| H["Practice and Master Your Deck"]

%% Procedure to troubleshoot a flashing‑blue PS5 controller
flowchart TD
    A["Check Controller's Battery: Charge DualSense controller via USB‑C cable"] -->|"Charged DualSense controller"| B["Restart PlayStation 5 console"]
    B -->|"Power‑cycled PlayStation 5 console"| C["Reset DualSense controller (press reset button, re‑pair)"]
    C -->|"Reset DualSense controller"| D["Check for Firmware Updates (system & controller)"]
    D -->|"Firmware status verified"| E["Try a Different USB‑C cable"]
    E -->|"Alternative USB‑C cable used"| F["Try Connecting to Another Device (another PS5 or PC)"]
    F -->|"Controller tested on another device"| G["Contact PlayStation Support (hardware issue)"]

%% Procedure to complete the Community Center in Stardew Valley
flowchart TD
    A["Introduction (Mayor Lewis)"] --> B["Investigate Community Center (find Golden Scroll)"]
    B -->| "Golden Scroll (-> Golden Scroll)" | C["Visit Wizard (receive Letter, learn Junimo language)"]
    C -->| "Junimo language (-> Junimo language)" | D["Complete Crafts Room Bundles"]
    C -->| "Junimo language (-> Junimo language)" | E["Complete Pantry Bundles"]
    C -->| "Junimo language (-> Junimo language)" | F["Complete Fish Tank Bundles"]
    C -->| "Junimo language (-> Junimo language)" | G["Complete Boiler Room Bundles"]
    C -->| "Junimo language (-> Junimo language)" | H["Complete Bulletin Board Bundles"]

    F --> J
    G --> J
    H --> J
    I --> J

%% Strategies for Clash Royale gameplay
flowchart TD
    A["Understand Your Deck (cards, elixir costs, strengths/weaknesses)"]
    B["Elixir Management (maintain advantage, trade positively)"]
    C["Build a Balanced Deck (offensive & defensive mix, counters)"]
    D["Starting Moves (play low‑risk card or defensive building)"]
    E["Push and Counter‑Push (support troops, use surviving units)"]
    F["Placement and Timing (optimal placement, timing of deployment)"]
    G["Defensive Strategies (buildings, splash damage, distraction)"]
    H["Offensive Strategies (tank + damage troops, spells)"]
    I["Watch Opponent’s Moves (track cycle, predict)"]
    J["Adjust Your Strategy (flexible, adapt to match)"]
    K["Endgame Strategy (double elixir, final push)"]
    L["Practice and Learn (replays, study top decks)"]

    A -->|cards, strengths/weaknesses| C
    A --> G
    A --> H
    B -->|elixir advantage| C
    B --> D
    C --> D
    D -->|low‑risk card or building| E
    E -->|troop support, surviving units| F
    F --> G
    F --> H
    G --> H
    I -->|opponent's cycle info| J
    J -->|adjusted strategy| K
    K --> L
    L -->|replay analysis improves deck knowledge| A

%% Procedure to play Codenames
flowchart TD
    A["Form Teams (Spymaster, Field Operatives)"] -->|Spymaster, Field Operatives| E["Spymaster Gives Clues (Clue & Number)"]
    A -->|Field Operatives| F["Field Operatives Guess (Chosen Codename)"]
    B["Prepare Game Board (25 codename cards)"] -->|Game Board| C["Select a Key Card (Key Card)"]
    C -->|Key Card| D["Determine Starting Team (Starting Team)"]
    C -->|Key Card| G["Reveal Codenames (Result)"]
    D -->|Starting Team| E
    E -->|Clue & Number| H["Ending a Turn (Turn End Conditions)"]
    E -->|Clue| F
    F -->|Chosen Codename| G
    G -->|Result| H
    G -->|Assassin guessed| J["Winning (Loss)"]
    H -->|Turn ends| I["Switch Turns (Next Team)"]
    H -->|All agents found| J["Winning (Victory)"]
    I -->|Next Team| E

%% Procedure to escape prison in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Enter Prison (-> Prison)"] -->|"Prison"| B["Access Escape Mini-Game (-> Prison tab → Escape)"]
    B -->|"Escape Mini-Game"| C["Plan Your Moves (guard moves twice per player move)"]
    C -->|"Guard movement"| D["Avoid Detection (guard on same tile = caught)"]
    D -->|"Walls"| E["Navigate the Maze using Walls"]
    E -->|"Guard path"| F["Calculate Moves & Predict Guard Path"]
    F -->|"Walls"| G["Strategically Use Walls to block guard"]
    G -->|"Exit Door"| H["Gradually Move Toward Exit"]
    H -->|"Clear Path"| I["Execute the Escape (run to Exit)"]
    I -->|"Escaped"| J["Life After Escape (on the run)"]

%% Procedure to navigate "There Is No Game"
flowchart TD
    A["Start the Game (-> \"There Is No Game\")"] --> B["Title Screen – click the letters"]
    B --> C["Drop the 'O' (-> O)"]
    C -->|O| D["Break the Letters using the fallen O"]
    D -->|O| E["Find the Trophy (-> Trophy)"]
    E -->|Trophy| F["Use the Trophy (-> Trophy)"]
    F -->|Trophy| G["Fix Narrator’s Problem – break the blocking block with Trophy"]
    G -->|Trophy| H["Unlock the Goat – new scene with goat and locked cage"]
    H -->|Trophy| J["Create a Nut (use Trophy) (-> Nut)"]
    J -->|Nut| K["Open the Nut (crack it on a hard surface)"]
    K -->|Nut| L["Give the cracked Nut to the Squirrel"]
    L -->|Nut| M["Receive the Key from the Squirrel (-> Key)"]
    M -->|Key| N["Unlock the Cage with the Key – free the Goat"]
    N --> O["Watch the Ending – humorous finale"]
    O --> P["Final Messages from the Narrator"]
    P --> Q["End of Game – you have completed \"There Is No Game\""]

%% Procedure to set a PS5 as primary (Console Sharing and Offline Play)
flowchart TD
    A["Sign in to owner PSN account on PS5 (-> owner account)"] --> C["Open Settings (gear icon)"]
    B["Update to latest PS5 system software"] --> C
    C --> D["Choose Users and Accounts"]
    D --> E["Select Other"]
    E --> F["Select Console Sharing and Offline Play"]
    F --> G["Choose Enable (sets PS5 as primary)"]
    G -->| "owner's games" | H["Other users download owner's games (-> owner's games)"]
    H -->| "downloaded games" | I["Play games offline (requires downloaded games)"]

%% Procedure to rob a train in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Age Requirement: character must be ≥18 years old (-> character)"] -->|character age ≥18| B["Navigate to Crime Menu (Activities → Crime)"]
    B --> C["Select Train Robbery"]
    C --> D["Plan the Robbery: improve Smarts and Craziness (-> character stats)"]
    D -->|improved Smarts & Craziness| E["Choose Timing and Approach (based on character stats)"]
    E -->|chosen timing/approach| F["Execute the Heist"]
    F -->|outcome based on decisions| G["Deal with Consequences: loot if successful, prison if caught"]
    G -->|optional repeat| H["Repeat if Necessary (-> future years)"]

%% Procedure to change display resolution on a Steam Deck
flowchart TD
    A["Power On the Steam Deck (ensure turned on and logged in)"]
    B["Access the Steam Button (open main menu)"]
    C["Navigate to Settings (open Settings menu)"]
    D["Select Display (open Display settings)"]
    E["Adjust the Resolution (choose desired resolution)"]
    F["Apply the Changes (the system (-> Steam Deck) may prompt to confirm; select Apply)"]
    G["Exit the Menu (press B or Steam button to return)"]
    A --> B
    B -->|"main menu"| C
    C -->|"Settings menu"| D
    D -->|"Display settings"| E
    E -->|"desired resolution"| F
    F -->|"applied resolution"| G

%% Procedure to collect Pale Ore and upgrade the Nail in Hollow Knight
flowchart TD
    A["Ancient Basin: Defeat Broken Vessel (-> Broken Vessel) for Pale Ore"] -->|Pale Ore (-> Ancient Basin)| G["Upgrade Nail at Nailsmith (City of Tears) (-> Nailsmith)"]
    B["Deepnest: Find hidden chamber for Pale Ore"] -->|Pale Ore (-> Deepnest)| G
    C["Crystal Peak (Hallownest’s Crown): Reach top for Pale Ore"] -->|Pale Ore (-> Crystal Peak)| G
    D["Grubfather (Forgotten Crossroads): Rescue 31 grubs → receive Pale Ore"] -->|Pale Ore (-> Grubfather)| G
    E["Kingdom’s Edge: Defeat Nailmaster Oro (-> Nailmaster Oro) for Pale Ore"] -->|Pale Ore (-> Kingdom’s Edge)| G
    F["Resting Grounds: Give Seer 300 Essence → receive Pale Ore"] -->|Pale Ore (-> Seer)| G

%% Procedure to find and use Secret Note 19 in Stardew Valley
flowchart TD
    A["Obtain Magnifying Glass (via \"A Winter Mystery\" quest)"]
    B["Find Secret Note 19 (requires Magnifying Glass)"]

    I["Interact with Statue \"??HMTGF??\" (the statue → ??HMTGF??)"]

    C -->|Map| D
    D -->|Directions| E

    G -->|Hoe| H
    H -->|Statue \"??HMTGF??\"| I

%% Procedure to obtain Demon Keys and Colored Keys in Geometry Dash
flowchart TD
    %% Sources
    Q["Daily & Weekly Quests (earn orbs & diamonds)"]

    %% ---- Demon Keys ----
    D1["Play Online Levels (collect orbs)"]
    D2["Complete Levels (collect orbs)"]
    D3["Accumulate 500 orbs → receive Demon Key"]
    D4["Use Demon Key in Treasure Room (-> Treasure Room)"]

    Q --> D1
    D1 --> D2
    D2 --> D3 |"orbs (500)"|
    D3 --> D4 |"Demon Key"|


    %% ---- Colored Keys ----
    C1["Collect 50 diamonds (via levels, quests, daily chests)"]
    C2["Collect 500 diamonds (via levels, quests, daily chests)"]
    V1["Access Vault of Secrets (click lock icon in Settings) (-> Vault of Secrets)"]
    BK["Enter code \"The Challenge\" in Vault of Secrets → receive Blue Key"]
    B1["Unlock Basement (click door in Vault of Secrets) (-> Basement)"]
    GK["Enter code \"The Challenge\" in Basement → receive Green Key"]
    CT["Access Chamber of Time (click lock icon on Level Select) (-> Chamber of Time)"]
    OK["Enter code \"River\" in Chamber of Time → receive Orange Key"]

    Q --> C1
    Q --> C2

    C1 --> V1 |"50 diamonds"|
    V1 --> BK |"Blue Key"|
    V1 --> B1
    B1 --> GK |"Green Key"|
    V1 --> CT |"Vault of Secrets"|
    C2 --> CT |"500 diamonds"|
    CT --> OK |"Orange Key"|
